name: Quinoa Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse quinoa with cold water and drain well.
2. Heat oil in a large non-stick frying pan. Add onion, garlic, pine nuts, and peppers and cook over medium heat until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
3. Add sweet potato, raisins, and quinoa to the pan; stir for 1 minute.
4. Stir in broth and black pepper. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until liquid is absorbed and quinoa is tender, 15 to 20 minutes.
6. Fluff quinoa mixture with a fork and serve at once. Serves 4. Makes 11 cups.
[558 cals/15.6 g fat]
This recipe was archived at Mc-Recipe. Part of a "COLLECTION (5) Grain and Vegetable Casseroles," [PATh 15 Oc 96]
